summary: Tested 3 new CourtBound features: Public Programme Page, Coach Analytics, and Landing Page Redesign. All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified. One transient 500 on /api/coach/analytics on first load (httpx.RemoteProtocolError from Supabase), auto-resolved on retry — intermittent, not a code bug.

minor.issue: Intermittent httpx.RemoteProtocolError: Server disconnected from Supabase causing 500 on first load. Auto-recovers on retry. Seen once in test run.

features_verified.public_program_page: PASS - /coach/program/test-university renders without auth. data-testid=coach-program-page, institution-name='Test University', programme-header, programme-about, recruiting-needs (SG, 2027), player-cta-card, player-register-cta all present
features_verified.public_api: PASS - GET /api/coach/public/test-university returns 200, coach_name='Test Coach', institution_name='Test University', recruiting_prefs.positions=['SG']
features_verified.analytics_api: PASS - GET /api/coach/analytics returns 200 with views{all_time,last_7d,last_30d}, saves{total,by_list}, messages_sent, daily_views (14 entries)
features_verified.analytics_dashboard: PASS - coach-analytics-section renders on dashboard, 4 KPI cards show numeric values (12 views, 1 saved, 1 message), chart area present
features_verified.landing_page_design: PASS - /coach shows premium dark slate-950 design with gradient hero, stats ribbon, 6 feature cards, all CTA buttons present
features_verified.landing_page_ctas: PASS - nav-register-btn navigates to /coach/register, nav-login-link present

critical_code_review_comments: CoachDashboard.js line 109: analytics fetch has no .catch() handler — silent failure leaves analytics null. Low priority since it recovers on page refresh but worth adding error handling.
coach_public.py fetches ALL verified coaches to find one by slug — O(n) scan. Consider adding a slug column to coach_accounts table for direct indexed lookup at scale.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features all working: Public Programme Page (/coach/program/:slug), Coach Analytics inline on dashboard, Landing Page redesign. testcoach@courtbound.edu has slug=test-university, institution='Test University', recruiting_prefs.positions=['SG'], grad_years=['2027']. Analytics shows 12 all-time views and 1 saved player from previous test runs.
